data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Damage/cleaning bond', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions a '$500 damage deposit held', there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate how this bond is enforced or managed within the system. This indicates a gap in the implementation of the requirement, as the evidence does not provide sufficient detail to confirm compliance with the stated need.
gaps: No explicit validation or enforcement mechanism for the 'Damage/cleaning bond'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define enforcement mechanism for damage/cleaning bond
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system enforces the collection and management of the damage/cleaning bond.
